mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_task ( id, user_id, folder_id, task_type, status, title, input_json, plan_json, draft_json, final_json, python_thread_id, error_code, error_message ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{folderId}, #{taskType}, #{status}, #{title}, #{inputJson}, #{planJson}, #{draftJson}, #{finalJson}, #{pythonThreadId}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, folder_id, task_type, status, title, input_json, plan_json, draft_json, final_json, python_thread_id, error_code, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_task WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id, folder_id, task_type, status, title, input_json, plan_json, draft_json, final_json, python_thread_id, error_code, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_task WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, user_id, folder_id, task_type, status, title, input_json, plan_json, draft_json, final_json, python_thread_id, error_code, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_task WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id, folder_id, task_type, status, title, input_json, plan_json, draft_json, final_json, python_thread_id, error_code, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, user_id, folder_id, task_type, status, title, input_json, plan_json, draft_json, final_json, python_thread_id, error_code, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND folder_id = #{folderId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, user_id, folder_id, task_type, status, title, input_json, plan_json, draft_json, final_json, python_thread_id, error_code, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND folder_id IS NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_task SET status = #{status}, plan_json = #{planJson}, draft_json = #{draftJson}, final_json = #{finalJson}, python_thread_id = #{pythonThreadId}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
